title: VeriSign (VRSN) Q1 Earnings Top Estimates, Revenues Up Y/Y
text: VeriSign's (VRSN) Q1 revenues increase year over year driven by rising demand for Internet infrastructure services.

title: VeriSign (VRSN) to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: VeriSign (VRSN) first-quarter performance is expected to have benefited from growing Internet consumption. However, ongoing weakness in global macroeconomic conditions might have been a concern.
